issues.detail: Missing error handling and troubleshooting guidance for common failure scenarios such as missing API keys or network errors.
Skill is specific to PicoClaw and requires Go or Docker, limiting compatibility with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Telegram bot with allowlist on Pi
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces a generic python-telegram-bot script with no reference to picoclaw onboard, ~/.picoclaw/config.json, channels.telegram.allow_from, or picoclaw gateway; treatment hits all four PicoClaw-specific checks.

scenarios.name: Heartbeat scheduled web search
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to a cron loop and a generic search API with no mention of HEARTBEAT.md, heartbeat.interval, or tools.web.brave/duckduckgo config keys, whereas treatment configures all three exactly as documented.
